arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic boss makes bullish centre-back prediction
arts.sum: Toby Sibbick has been backed to provide a 'really aggressive' challenge to Jason Kerr and Will Aimson for their centre-half spots at Wigan Athletic.

arts.ttl: Jensen Weir on righting a wrong at Wigan Athletic - 'It was nice of him to say that...it feels like an achievement...'
arts.sum: Jensen Weir admits he always knew his football journey would bring him back to Wigan Athletic - to right a huge wrong from the summer of 2020.
